prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical warm portrait photograph of a 25-year-old man indoors, shown from the chest up while hugging one large fluffy Maine Coon cat. The man has neatly styled dark brown hair with natural shine, light stubble or a short beard visible at the jaw, and wears a soft cream-white ribbed knit sweater; his face is relaxed and affectionate, smiling gently with eyes closed as he presses close to the cat. The Maine Coon is the main visible subject in the lower half: brown tabby fur, very long fluffy ruff, large pointed ears with tufts, closed eyes, calm content expression, detailed whiskers, and one big furry paw reaching toward the foreground. The man’s arms wrap securely around the cat, with one hand visible across the cat’s chest. Use cozy emotional atmosphere, soft natural window light from the right, warm beige and brown tones, shallow depth of field, blurred home interior background, realistic skin, hair, fabric, and fur texture, intimate candid framing, 3:4 vertical composition. Add no readable text except a tiny subtle white signature-style watermark in the bottom-right corner if desired. Avoid extra people, extra animals, cartoon styling, distorted anatomy, and harsh studio lighting.
